allow: Bash(python -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\('RF gecikme tahmini:', d['rf_predicted_total_delay_min'], 'dk'\) print\('Orijinal:', d['original_order']['metrics']\) print\('Optimize:', d['optimized_order']['metrics']\) print\('Iyilesme:', d['improvement']\) print\(\) print\('-- Orijinal durak-1 dinamik koşul:'\) print\(json.dumps\(d['original_order']['stops'][0]['dynamic_conditions'], indent=2\)\) print\('-- Optimize durak-1 dinamik koşul:'\) print\(json.dumps\(d['optimized_order']['stops'][0]['dynamic_conditions'], indent=2\)\) ")
